title: SKIPPER'S Training Treats for Dog Chews and Puppy Training Treats 500g - Source of Omega 3, Grain Free, Good for Digestion 100% Natural Ingredients No Additives
features: ♥ 𝐇𝐄𝐀𝐋𝐓𝐇𝐘 𝐓𝐑𝐀𝐈𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐓𝐑𝐄𝐀𝐓 - Our fishtastic Training Treats are made from 80% freshly prepared and gently steam cooked Salmon and Trout. The perfect fish-shaped tiddler size to use as high value, highly digestible rewards that are great for sensitive stomachs.

♥ 𝐏𝐑𝐄𝐌𝐈𝐔𝐌 𝐐𝐔𝐀𝐋𝐈𝐓𝐘 - Fish is an excellent source of essential omega oils, and packed with important health benefits helping to relieve the effects of arthritis by reducing inflammation in dogs’ joints, promoting shiny coats, calming dry, itchy skin and supporting the hearts cardiovascular health. Long lasting dog chew dog food,

♥ 𝐌𝐀𝐃𝐄 𝐈𝐍 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐔𝐊 𝐖𝐈𝐓𝐇 𝐂𝐀𝐑𝐄 𝐀𝐍𝐃 𝐋𝐎𝐕𝐄 - We use only 100% natural ingredients, including freshly prepared and gently steam cooked Salmon and Trout to produce our delicious, nutritious, grain-free fishy training treats. No rice, no wheat, just 80% fish, sweet potato and potato. 80% Freshly Prepared and Gently Steam Cooked Fish.

♥ 𝐎𝐍𝐋𝐘 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐁𝐄𝐒𝐓 𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐘𝐎𝐔𝐑 𝐁𝐄𝐒𝐓 𝐅𝐑𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐃 - Our training treats are the perfect rewards for dogs of any breed, small or large. Whether they're a puppy, an adult or a senior we're sure they'll find them irresistible. There's over a whopping 1000 dog treats in each food pouches, making them excellent value for money.

♥ 𝐀𝐒𝐊 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐄𝐗𝐏𝐄𝐑𝐓𝐒- With over 100 years of combined knowledge and experience in the pet and fishing industries, we are best equipped to advise our customers on the most nutritious complete food and dog snacks. Our team includes four-legged taste testers who continually monitor our products to ensure they are the tastiest fish treats around.

Skipper's is dedicated to providing high-quality, nutritious, and tasty dog food products that prioritize your dog's health and happiness. We source the finest ingredients, free from fillers and artificial additives. How do Skipper's ensure the safety and quality of products? At Skipper's, safety and quality are paramount. We implement rigorous quality control measures throughout our production process, from sourcing ingredients to packaging. Skipper's products are made with love and your dog's well-being in mind. Are Skipper's products suitable for all dog breeds? Yes, Skipper's products are formulated to be suitable for all dog breeds and sizes, ensuring that every furry friend can enjoy our nutritious and delicious offerings. Are Skipper's treats made with natural ingredients? Absolutely! Skipper's is committed to providing the best for your dog, which is why our treats are made with natural ingredients. We use real fish, carefully selected fruits and vegetables, and avoid artificial additives, colors, and preservatives. What types of fish are used in Skipper's dog treats? Skipper's uses a variety of high-quality fish sources in our treats, including salmon, trout, and whitefish. Each type of fish offers its unique flavor and nutritional benefits, ensuring that your dog gets a diverse range of nutrients. Premium Ingredients Our dog treats are made from the finest, high-quality ingredients. Ensuring that every treat is packed with wholesome goodness for your furry friend. Nutritional Balance These treats are specially formulated to provide a perfect balance of nutrients. Improves Digestion Our treats contain natural fiber sources that aid in digestion. Fiber promotes regular bowel movements and can reduce the risk of constipation. Grain-Free Treats Our Grain-Free Treats are made with the finest natural ingredients, carefully selected to exclude grains.
